raw_text:
Manchester ▪ 07123 456 789
     Sonja   Kardos                                                               
                                                sonjakardosexample@email.com ▪ Portfolio
     Senior Graphic Designer                                                      
     An innovative and creative Graphic Designer, with 5+ years of experience in bringing corporate marketing
     strategies to life. Highly effective at collaborating with production, product, and administrative leadership to
     complete projects in line with schedules and budgets. Looking for a challenging graphic design position which
     complements this niche skill set.                                            
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Key   Skills                                                                 
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
        ●  Adobe Creative Cloud ●  Typography           ●  Production standards   
        ●  Corporate branding   ●  Illustration         ●  Teamwork               
        ●  Logo design          ●  Interactive media    ●  Effective planning     
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Employment       History                                                     
                                                                                  
     Jigsaw Design Lab, Manchester                              July 2020 – Present
     Senior Graphic Designer                                                      
                                                                                  
     Senior Designer in an industry-renowned creative design agency, responsible for client relationships and
     retention. Acts as Senior Design Specialist on key accounts.                 
       ●  Confidently communicates with clients to determine marketing and design vision and establish scope,
          budgets, and delivery schedules                                         
       ●  Develops corporate brand identity by designing visual styles across different elements, including
          typography, iconography, and logos                                      
       ●  Uses expert insights into brand immersion and perception to create marketing materials that align with
          brands                                                                  
       ●  Assists with winning new business by supporting pitches and identifying cross-selling opportunities with
          existing clients                                                        
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Creative Solutions, Manchester                       November 2018 – June 2020
     Multimedia Designer                                                          
     Worked alongside Creatives, Designers, Digital Artists, and Filmmakers, developing video concepts and taking
     them through to completion for big-name brands.                              
                                                                                  
       ●  Successfully managed multiple video projects from storyboard to delivery
       ●  Confidently pitched concepts to clients and stakeholders, interpreting needs and adding value
                                                                                  
     Productify, London                                  February 2017 – October 2018
     Graphic Designer                                                             
                                                                                  
     Worked within the graphic design team, comprising 15 members, to develop product designs for advertisements,
     brochures, websites, and social media.                                       
       ●  Managed 6 - 10 graphic editing projects a day, including redesigning, retouching, and enhancing product
          imagery for marketing collateral                                        
       ●  Improved project scoping efficiency by reviewing and amending brand immersion workflows and
          templates                                                               
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                      Page1|2     
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Media Creative Network, London                    September 2016 – February 2017
     Junior Graduate Designer                                                     
     Worked alongside the Creative Director at a small creative agency, converting ideas into print and digital designs
     for clients.                                                                 
                                                                                  
       ●  Contributed to a TV ad campaign which won a Digital Excellence Award    
       ●  Created training documentation on video production and motion graphics for new starters
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Education     and  Qualifications                                            
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Brand Identity and Strategy Course                                           
     CIPD, 2019                                                                   
                                                                                  
     Digital Skills: Digital Marketing Certificate                                
     Accenture, 2018                                                              
     Digital Skills: Social Media and Creative Marketing Certificate              
     Accenture, 2018                                                              
                                                                                  
     BA (Hons) Degree in Graphic Design                                           
     Arts University Bournemouth, 2016                                            
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Technical    Skills                                                          
                                                                                  
     Adobe Creative Cloud and CorelDraw

                                                                      Page2|2
